name: markstream-vue
description: Vue/Nuxt streaming Markdown renderer for AI chat, LLM token streams, SSE/WebSocket output, incomplete Markdown, long documents, Mermaid, KaTeX, Shiki, and Monaco.
author: Simon He

scripts.test:api:loose: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.node-no-dom.json --noEmit && pnpm run build && pnpm exec vue-tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.json --noEmit && pnpm exec vue-tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.package.json --noEmit && node scripts/check-public-api.mjs && node scripts/check-public-api-runtime.mjs && node scripts/check-package-exports.mjs && node scripts/check-subpath-isolation.mjs
scripts.test:api:strict: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.node-no-dom.json --noEmit && pnpm run build && pnpm exec vue-tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.json --noEmit && pnpm exec vue-tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.package.json --noEmit && node scripts/check-public-api.mjs --strict && node scripts/check-public-api-runtime.mjs && node scripts/check-package-exports.mjs && node scripts/check-subpath-isolation.mjs
scripts.test:api:update: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.node-no-dom.json --noEmit && pnpm run build && pnpm exec vue-tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.json --noEmit && pnpm exec vue-tsc -p tsconfig.public-api.package.json --noEmit && node scripts/check-public-api.mjs --update && node scripts/check-public-api-runtime.mjs && node scripts/check-package-exports.mjs && node scripts/check-subpath-isolation.mjs
scripts.release:verify: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm run build:core && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm exec vitest --run --testTimeout=10000 && pnpm run test:api:strict && pnpm run test:smoke:core && pnpm run test:smoke:vue2-cjs && MARKSTREAM_SMOKE_SKIP_BUILD=1 pnpm run test:smoke:pack && MARKSTREAM_SMOKE_SKIP_BUILD=1 pnpm run test:smoke:pack:optional
scripts.release:verify:e2e: pnpm run release:verify && pnpm run test:e2e:virtual-scroll && pnpm run test:e2e:virtual-scroll:stress
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run build:parser && npm run build:pack && pnpm run check:workspace-deps-published && pnpm run test:smoke:core && pnpm run test:smoke:vue2-cjs && MARKSTREAM_SMOKE_SKIP_BUILD=1 pnpm run test:smoke:pack && MARKSTREAM_SMOKE_SKIP_BUILD=1 pnpm run test:smoke:pack:optional
scripts.play:next14: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm --filter markstream-react build && pnpm run -C playground-next14 dev
scripts.play:next15: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm --filter markstream-react build && pnpm run -C playground-next15 dev
scripts.build: pnpm run build:core && vite build --mode npm && node scripts/cleanup-style-entry.mjs && node scripts/write-tailwind-types.mjs && vite build --config vite.config.tailwind.ts --mode npm && node scripts/copy-tailwind-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-px-css.mjs && pnpm run build:dts
scripts.build:pack: pnpm run build:core && vite build --mode npm && node scripts/cleanup-style-entry.mjs && node scripts/write-tailwind-types.mjs && vite build --config vite.config.tailwind.ts --mode npm && node scripts/copy-tailwind-css.mjs && node scripts/generate-px-css.mjs && pnpm run build:dts:pack
scripts.size:check: MAX_DIST_BYTES=1003520 MAX_JS_CHUNK_BYTES=281600 MAX_PACK_TGZ_BYTES=286720 MAX_PACK_UNPACKED_BYTES=1105920 node scripts/check-package-size.mjs
scripts.docs:llms:check: pnpm run docs:llms:generate && git diff --exit-code -- docs/public/llms.txt docs/public/llms.zh-CN.txt docs/public/llms-full.txt docs/public/llms-full.zh-CN.txt docs/public/llms-routing.txt
scripts.docs:seo:check: pnpm docs:seo:source && pnpm docs:check-zh && pnpm docs:build && node scripts/check-docs-seo-output.mjs
scripts.docs:build:ci: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm run build && pnpm docs:seo:check
scripts.docs:build:gh:ci: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm run build && pnpm docs:build:gh
scripts.docs:deploy:netlify: pnpm docs:build && echo 'Docs built to docs/.vitepress/dist'
scripts.release: bumpp --all --commit --no-tag --no-push --execute 'pnpm run docs:llms:generate && conventional-changelog -p angular --tag-prefix markstream-vue@ -i CHANGELOG.md -s -r 1' && pnpm run check:workspace-deps-published && pnpm publish $(node scripts/dist-tag.mjs) && node scripts/tag-package.mjs --package-json package.json --push
scripts.release:gate:1.0: pnpm run release:verify && pnpm run docs:build:ci && pnpm run size:check && pnpm run check:packed-workspace-deps && MARKSTREAM_RELEASE_GATE=1 MARKSTREAM_BENCHMARK_OUTPUT_DIR=.tmp/benchmark pnpm run benchmark:1.0 && MARKSTREAM_REAL_CORPUS_OUTPUT_DIR=.tmp/benchmark/real-corpus pnpm run benchmark:real-corpus
scripts.publish:vue3:current: pnpm run check:workspace-deps-published && pnpm run check:packed-workspace-deps && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json package.json
scripts.publish:react:current: node scripts/check-workspace-deps-published.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-react/package.json && node scripts/check-packed-workspace-deps.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-react/package.json && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-react/package.json
scripts.publish:svelte:current: node scripts/check-workspace-deps-published.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-svelte/package.json && node scripts/check-packed-workspace-deps.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-svelte/package.json && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-svelte/package.json
scripts.publish:angular:current: node scripts/check-workspace-deps-published.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-angular/package.json && node scripts/check-packed-workspace-deps.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-angular/package.json && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-angular/package.json
scripts.publish:vue3:dry-run: pnpm run check:workspace-deps-local && pnpm run check:packed-workspace-deps && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json package.json --dry-run
scripts.publish:react:dry-run: node scripts/check-workspace-deps-local.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-react/package.json && node scripts/check-packed-workspace-deps.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-react/package.json && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-react/package.json --dry-run
scripts.publish:svelte:dry-run: node scripts/check-workspace-deps-local.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-svelte/package.json && node scripts/check-packed-workspace-deps.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-svelte/package.json && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-svelte/package.json --dry-run
scripts.publish:angular:dry-run: node scripts/check-workspace-deps-local.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-angular/package.json && node scripts/check-packed-workspace-deps.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-angular/package.json && node scripts/publish-current-package.mjs --package-json packages/markstream-angular/package.json --dry-run
scripts.release:dry-run:1.0: pnpm run release:gate:1.0 && pnpm run publish:parser:dry-run && pnpm run publish:core:dry-run && pnpm run publish:vue3:dry-run
scripts.release:1.0: pnpm run release:gate:1.0 && pnpm run publish:parser:current && pnpm run publish:core:current && pnpm run publish:vue3:current
scripts.release:family:dry-run: pnpm run docs:check-llms && pnpm run docs:build:ci && pnpm run publish:vue3:dry-run && pnpm run publish:react:dry-run && pnpm run publish:svelte:dry-run && pnpm run publish:angular:dry-run
scripts.release:family: pnpm run docs:check-llms && pnpm run release:gate:1.0 && pnpm run publish:parser:current && pnpm run publish:core:current && pnpm run publish:vue3:current && pnpm run publish:react:current && pnpm run publish:svelte:current && pnpm run publish:angular:current
scripts.test:smoke:core: pnpm run -C packages/markstream-core build && node -e "import('markstream-core').then((m) => { if (!m.createSmoothMarkdownStream) process.exit(1) })" && node -e "const { createRequire } = require('node:module'); const req = createRequire(process.cwd() + '/'); const m = req('markstream-core'); if (!m.createSmoothMarkdownStream) process.exit(1)"
scripts.test:smoke:react: pnpm run build:parser && pnpm --filter markstream-react build && pnpm --filter markstream-react check:exports && node scripts/smoke-react-packed-package.mjs
scripts.test:smoke:vue2-cjs: pnpm run -C packages/markdown-parser build && pnpm run -C packages/markstream-core build && pnpm run -C packages/markstream-vue2 build && node scripts/smoke-vue2-cjs.cjs
scripts.test:e2e:next-ssr: pnpm run test:e2e:next14-ssr && pnpm run test:e2e:next15-ssr
